pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 22 creates workspace at this path; export_result.sh line 26 queries documents from this path; path format verified against Nuxeo documentation

setup_task.sh lines 51-52 creates document with description 'Obsolete initial draft from 2022 - ARCHIVE ONLY'; verifier.py line 27 confirms should_trash=True; Nuxeo documentation confirms 'deleted' is the correct lifecycle state for trashed documents (see https://doc.nuxeo.com/nxdoc/trash-service/ and https://doc.nuxeo.com/nxdoc/deleting-content/)

setup_task.sh lines 55-56 creates document with description 'Obsolete review copy, superseded by Final version'; verifier.py line 28 confirms should_trash=True; Nuxeo documentation confirms 'deleted' is a valid lifecycle state (https://doc.nuxeo.com/nxdoc/trash-service/)

setup_task.sh lines 59-60 creates document with description 'Approved and signed 2023 version'; verifier.py line 29 confirms should_trash=False; Nuxeo documentation confirms 'project' is the default initial lifecycle state (https://doc.nuxeo.com/studio/life-cycle/)
setup_task.sh lines 63-64 creates document with description 'Active working copy - DO NOT DELETE'; verifier.py line 30 confirms should_trash=False; 'project' is the default Nuxeo lifecycle state
setup_task.sh lines 67-68 creates document with description 'Permanent record for audit compliance'; verifier.py line 31 confirms should_trash=False; 'project' is the default Nuxeo lifecycle state

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Nuxeo workspace at /default-domain/workspaces/Cleanup_Zone containing five documents: Project-Alpha-Draft-v1 and Project-Alpha-Draft-v2 are designated for deletion (deleted state), while Project-Alpha-Final, Project-Beta-Draft, and Regulatory-Reference are marked for preservation in the project state. All metadata claims have been verified against task setup scripts and Nuxeo platform documentation confirming that 'deleted' is a valid lifecycle state for trashed documents and 'project' is the default active state.
